channel.title: Strands Agents Blog - Open Source
channel.description: Posts tagged with "Open Source" from the Strands Agents blog.

item.title: Strands Agents TypeScript SDK: Build AI Agents in TypeScript
item.description: The Strands Agents TypeScript SDK brings the model-driven approach to the TypeScript ecosystem. Build type-safe AI agents that run in Node.js and the browser.

item.title: Runtime Guardrails for Strands Agents with Agent Control
item.description: Define what your Strands agents can and can't do at runtime, without changing a line of agent code.

item.title: Introducing Strands Labs: Get hands-on today with state-of-the-art, experimental approaches to agentic development
item.description: Strands Labs is a new GitHub organization designed to give developers the ability to get hands-on with experimental, state-of-the-art approaches to agentic AI development.

item.title: Introducing Strands Agent SOPs – Natural Language Workflows for AI Agents
item.description: Agent SOPs are a standardized markdown format for defining AI agent workflows in natural language that balances flexibility and control.

item.title: Introducing Strands Agents, an Open Source AI Agents SDK
item.description: Strands Agents is an open source SDK that takes a model-driven approach to building and running AI agents in just a few lines of code.
